revision.content:
Bloominglabs has acquired a new mill!

[[Image:Mill1.jpg]]

The Mill was bought in 2012 by Jenett, we are no longer soliciting funds for this.

<s>The cost was $420. If you are willing to chip in for the mill so that the club can own it (rather than Jenett own it), put your pledge below:</s>

== Pledges ==
* Jenett - $50
* Nathan - $100
* Charles - $20
* Jesse - $50
